theme: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4 with Technical Border Layout)

rules: No generic fonts like Inter, Roboto for headings.
Headlines > 32px must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Overlines / Labels must be Uppercase, Tiny, and Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line height: Tight (leading-none) for headers, Loose (leading-relaxed) for body.
Max hero heading size: text-6xl (do not exceed).
Mobile-first responsive always.
Grid Layouts: Grid items MUST be direct children of grid containers.
Dashboard Cards: Flat solid backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift (-translate-y-1).
Spacing: Use generous spacing. Prefer p-8, p-12 over cramped p-4.
Containers with borders must have internal padding.
Never center align the app container. No '.App { text-align: center; }'.

drag_and_drop_upload.style: Hybrid approach. Massive dashed drop zone with a clear click-to-browse fallback button. Must never be drag-only.
drag_and_drop_upload.states: Drag-over state needs immediate highlight and 'Drop here' text.
drag_and_drop_upload.file_list: Display real-time linear progress bars per file (not indeterminate spinners).

general: Use Shadcn UI for forms, inputs, tables, dropdowns.
Do NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or modals. Use solid colors with borders.
Buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular. Must have explicit hover color (e.g., hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-white).
Interactive elements must have micro-animations (excluding transforms from generic 'transition-all').

rules: DO NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). This breaks transforms.
Use specific transitions like 'transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease'.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion for accessibility.
All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover and focus states.
Focus states must have HIGHER contrast than default state.
Ensure 4.5:1 text contrast minimum.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

login_side_banner.description: Minimal geometric shapes on a split background, to be used on the side panel of the login screen.

rules: NEVER use placeholder URLs.
Never use AI emoji characters for icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Work Sans and IBM Plex Sans.
Implement light and dark mode toggling using Tailwind classes.
Do NOT use TSX files, this is a JS project.
Create a robust Drag-and-Drop file uploader that can handle up to 200 Word documents.
Show a data table for previewing extracted content (Titles, H1, H2, Body).
Use solid backgrounds, crisp borders, and maintain the 'Technical Look' across the application.
Apply data-testid to every interactive component you create.
Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic by ensuring layered design, intentional spacing, and appropriate typography hierarchy.
